effect.u_message:
"EMERGENCY ALERT.  This is not a test.
The ship is under attack from an unknown force.  Additionally, an unidentified and rapidly spreading condition is affecting individuals who fall asleep.
Every citizen is instructed to seek shelter immediately, secure basic necessities, and avoid falling sleep at all costs until further notice."

"EMERGENCY ALERT.
REMINDER.  The condition affecting the ship seems to respond negatively to certain psychoactive substances.  Coffee and similar substances seem to help people in general while alcohol and similar substances seems to prevent the terminal effect of the disease during sleep."

then.u_message: You hear the lights suddenly turn off.
